memberdef.argsstring: (const XVidC_VideoWindow *win, const u32 HActive, const u32 VActive)
memberdef.name: validateWindowSize

briefdescription.para: This function checks to make sure sub-frame is inside full frame.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the sub-frame window

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if window is valid else XST_FAILURE

briefdescription.para: This function computes the scaling mode based on input/output stream resolution.

detaileddescription.para: It also accounts for Zoom or PIP mode, if enabled

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function examines the subsystem Input/Output Stream configuration and builds a routing table for the supported use-case.

detaileddescription.para: The computed routing table is stored in the scratch pad memory

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if routing table can be created else XST_FAILURE

briefdescription.para: This function traverses the computed routing table and sets up the AXIS switch registers, to route the stream through processing cores, in the order defined in the routing map.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function traverses the routing map built earlier and configures each sub-core in the processing path per its location in the chain.

detaileddescription.para: Each core in the processing path is marked and only marked cores are started All remaining cores stay disabled

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.
